input.command:
cd contracts/external/openzeppelin/interfaces && \
git rm \
  IERC1155.sol \
  IERC1155MetadataURI.sol \
  IERC1155Receiver.sol \
  IERC1820Implementer.sol \
  IERC1820Registry.sol \
  IERC3156.sol \
  IERC721.sol \
  IERC721Enumerable.sol \
  IERC721Metadata.sol \
  IERC721Receiver.sol \
  IERC777.sol \
  IERC777Recipient.sol \
  IERC777Sender.sol \
  draft-IERC2612.sol; \
\
echo ""; \
echo "=== forge build ==="; \
forge build 2>&1 | grep -E '(Error|^error|Compiler run)' | head; \
echo "Exit: $?"
input.description: Delete 14 thin alias files and rebuild

input.command:
forge build 2>&1 | grep -A1 'interfaces/IERC721.sol' | head -20; \
echo ""; \
echo "=== Find all references to interfaces/IERC721.sol via any path ==="; \
grep -rn --include='*.sol' 'interfaces/IERC721.sol\|interfaces/IERC1155.sol\|interfaces/IERC1155MetadataURI.sol\|interfaces/IERC1155Receiver.sol\|interfaces/IERC1820Implementer.sol\|interfaces/IERC1820Registry.sol\|interfaces/IERC3156.sol\|interfaces/IERC721Enumerable.sol\|interfaces/IERC721Metadata.sol\|interfaces/IERC721Receiver.sol\|interfaces/IERC777.sol\|interfaces/IERC777Recipient.sol\|interfaces/IERC777Sender.sol\|interfaces/draft-IERC2612.sol' contracts test 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^contracts/external/openzeppelin/interfaces/' | head -30

input.command:
echo "=== Find all interfaces/ files that import deleted aliases via relative path ==="; \
for deleted in IERC1155 IERC1155MetadataURI IERC1155Receiver IERC1820Implementer IERC1820Registry IERC3156 IERC721 IERC721Enumerable IERC721Metadata IERC721Receiver IERC777 IERC777Recipient IERC777Sender draft-IERC2612; do \
  HITS=$(grep -lE "import.*[\"']\\./${deleted}\\.sol[\"']" contracts/external/openzeppelin/interfaces/*.sol 2>/dev/null); \
  if [ -n "$HITS" ]; then \
    echo "--- ${deleted}.sol referenced by ---"; \
    echo "$HITS"; \
  fi; \
done
input.description: Find sibling-interface consumers of deleted aliases
